core_mechanism: path-integral (sum over noise-driven trajectories weighted by an action functional) computation of the full probability distribution of a time-integrated functional of a stochastic dynamical system, whose long-time tails obey a symmetry (fluctuation-theorem) relation
brief_reason: The abstract computes the work distribution function of a noise-driven (Brownian) system via a path integral over trajectories and proves an asymptotic symmetry (fluctuation theorem) for that time-integrated observable.
